csvPropertyValue.csvvalue: scType + " " + scWarpYarnCount + "x" + scWeftYarnCount + " " + scWarpYarnSize + "x" + scWeftYarnSize + " " + scOtherYarnSize + " " + scContent + " " + scFiberTradeName + " " +scFiberTradeName2 + " " + scFiberTradeNameOther + " " + scWeight + " " + scWeightUOM + " " + scFabricFinish + " " + scWeightafterwash2
